docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,440.00 FILED BY DERE, WESLEY AS TO DEFENDANT HUYNH, JACK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF WESLEY DERE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JACK HUYNH IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - SERVED OCT-16-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HUYNH, JACK
